patient.name: Lucy Campbell
patient.medical_history: History of irregular periods since teenage years, no prior surgeries or hospitalizations.

timeline.summary: Triaged as SEMI_URGENT. Patient presenting with fatigue, dizziness, and headaches associated with menstrual cycle changes. Sent to doctor for further evaluation.

details.triage_reasoning: Patient presents with multiple moderate symptoms such as fatigue, dizziness, and headaches, which may suggest a combination of hormonal issues related to menstrual cycle changes. These warrant further evaluation but are not life-threatening at this moment.
details.notes: Patient's medical history does not indicate any acute conditions requiring immediate attention. Current medications are consistent with managing menstrual irregularities.
details.context_for_next: to evaluate hormonal symptoms and consider appropriate testing or treatment options.
details.viewer_output: Triaged as SEMI_URGENT. Patient presenting with fatigue, dizziness, and headaches associated with menstrual cycle changes. Sent to doctor for further evaluation.

timeline.summary: Diagnosis: Hormonal imbalance related to menstrual cycle changes leading to fatigue, dizziness, and headaches. Found 3 similar cases with successful outcomes. Treatment: Consider hormonal evaluation and lifestyle changes.

details.diagnosis: Hormonal imbalance related to menstrual cycle changes leading to fatigue, dizziness, and headaches.
details.recommended_treatment: Consider hormonal evaluation with labs such as estradiol, progesterone levels, and possibly thyroid function tests. Follow-up with lifestyle changes including diet and stress management.
details.context_for_next: Patient has several symptoms potentially related to hormonal issues; treatment options including testing have been discussed.
details.reasoning: Three similar cases (migraines and fibromyalgia) successfully treated without tests indicate a strong correlation with hormonal symptoms. Total tests completed: 0. Confidence in diagnosis given symptom pattern and relevant past experiences.
details.learning_principles_used: Used case #1: Symptoms of headaches indicated potential hormonal involvement; Applied principle: assessing symptoms and holistic treatment approach.
details.viewer_output: Diagnosis: Hormonal imbalance related to menstrual cycle changes leading to fatigue, dizziness, and headaches. Found 3 similar cases with successful outcomes. Treatment: Consider hormonal evaluation and lifestyle changes.

timeline.summary: Learned: Menstrual changes with fatigue and dizziness require a serum prolactin level to rule out prolactinoma. This will improve future prolactinoma diagnoses.

details.principle_text: Menstrual changes with fatigue and dizziness require a serum prolactin level to rule out prolactinoma.
details.reasoning: The error occurred due to misattributing symptoms to hormonal imbalances without appropriate testing for prolactinoma.
details.viewer_output: Learned: Menstrual changes with fatigue and dizziness require a serum prolactin level to rule out prolactinoma. This will improve future prolactinoma diagnoses.
